backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing product management (CRUD operations with admin-only access), user profile management, and role-based authorization using AccessControl mixin with Map-based storage for products and user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: adding uploaded product images to the browse page, creating an interactive category section with expandable images, and rendering static product images from the frontend assets directory.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the fashion e-commerce application with TanStack Router, React Query, and shadcn/ui.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors with sidebar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Fashion Products Website application with viewport meta tag and script reference to the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for product browsing, product details, and admin panel, plus conditional ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without profiles.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied page component displaying a shield alert icon, error message for non-admin users, and a button to return to the products page.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component rendering a button group with 'All' option and dynamic category buttons for filtering products, using rounded-full styling and variant-based selection state.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Interactive collapsible section displaying a clickable category thumbnail that toggles visibility of 7 product images in a responsive grid with hover effects, animations, and chevron indicators.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with sticky header containing branding, navigation, user profile display, admin link for authorized users, authentication controls using Internet Identity, and footer with copyright and Caffeine attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, name, category badge, price, and optional Pinterest pin indicator; links to product detail page with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing products with validation for name, description, price, category, image URL, and optional Pinterest pin ID fields.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name on first visit; prevents dismissal until profile is saved.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout with identity persistence and configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profile management, product CRUD operations, and admin status checks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind configuration, custom CSS variables for warm neutral color palette suitable for fashion e-commerce, and typography setup using Playfair Display and Inter fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin product management page with table view, add/edit/delete functionality using dialogs and forms, protected by admin authentication check.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page with hero banner, category filtering, product grid, and two promotional sections with Meesho affiliate links.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page displaying full product information with image, description, price, category badge, and Pinterest link button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, typography plugins, custom fonts (Inter and Playfair Display), and animation utilities.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features including product browsing, Pinterest integration, admin interface, category filtering, and promotional sections with affiliate links.
